title: dactylis glomerata subsp. rigida
intro: Dactylis glomerata subsp. rigida, also known as rigid grass or hard bent grass, is a subspecies of the Dactylis glomerata plant, belonging to the grass family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is known to provide several health benefits, such as aiding in digestion, relieving respiratory issues, and reducing fever. The herbal preparations of Dactylis glomerata subsp. rigida include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
